CustomField.description: Formula field showing the date of the document
CustomField.formula: if(BEGINS(TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c),'Adjustment - '), TEXT(leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent_Adjustment_Date__c), CASE(TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c) ,'Opening Balance', IF(!ISBLANK(leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent__r.leaseworks__Opening_Balance_Date_Override__c),TEXT(leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent__r.leaseworks__Opening_Balance_Date_Override__c),IF( OR((leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date__c < leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent__r.leaseworks__Min_Transaction_Date__c),ISBlank(leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent__r.leaseworks__Min_Transaction_Date__c)),TEXT(leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date__c),TEXT(leaseworks__Supplemental_Rent__r.leaseworks__Min_Transaction_Date__c))) ,'MR Invoice', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__c ) , leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Doc_Date__c , TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Date__c)) ,'MR Invoice Reconciliation', TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Date__c) ,'MR Invoice Overpayment Credit', TEXT(leaseworks__Credit_Memo_Date__c) ,'MR Cash Payment',IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__c) , leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Doc_Date__c , TEXT(leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Payment_Date__c)) ,'MR Payment Credit Applied',IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__c) , leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Doc_Date__c , TEXT(leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Payment_Date__c)) ,'MR Invoice Credit (Adjustment)',IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__c) , leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Doc_Date__c , TEXT(leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Payment_Date__c)) ,'MR Payment Offset',IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__c) , leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Doc_Date__c , TEXT(leaseworks__Payment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Payment_Date__c)) ,'MR Contribution Applied',TEXT(leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Payable_Date__c) ,'MR Contribution Used',TEXT(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Payout_Date__c) ,'MR Claim',TEXT(leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Payable_Date__c) ,'MR Claim Refund',TEXT(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Payout_Date__c) ,'MR Claim Offset',TEXT(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Payout_Date__c) ,'MR Rebate',TEXT(leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Payable_Date__c) ,'MR Rebate Payout',TEXT(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Payout_Date__c) ,'MR Manual Payable',TEXT(leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Payable_Date__c) ,'MR Manual Payout',TEXT(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Payout_Date__c) ,'Payable - MR Reconciliation',TEXT(leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Payable_Date__c) ,'Payout - MR Reconciliation',TEXT(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Payout_Date__c) ,'MR Transfer',TEXT(leaseworks__MR_Fund_Transfer_Date__c) ,'MR Accrued',TEXT(leaseworks__Utilization_Date__c) ,'MR Claim Accrued',TEXT(leaseworks__Claim_Date__c) ,'MR Invoice Adjustment',TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Adjustment_Line_Item__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Adjustment__r.leaseworks__Adjustment_Date__c) ,'MR Lessor Commitment Amount Applied',TEXT(leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Payable_Date__c) ,'MR Lessor Commitment Amount Used',TEXT(leaseworks__Event_Payout__r.leaseworks__Payout_Date__c) ,''))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-calculated field, showing the source document date
CustomField.label: Transaction Date
